title: Bouncy-qq Salty Turkish Flour Tortilla Quesadilla
description: A crowd-pleasing Turkish dish with a bouncy texture and a touch of saltiness, made with flour tortilla and served in a hot pot vessel.
instructions: Place a large flour tortilla on a flat surface and sprinkle a quarter of the mozzarella cheese in the center of the tortilla.
Add a quarter of the cottage cheese on top of the mozzarella cheese, followed by a sprinkle of salt, dill, and Turkish red pepper flakes.
Fold the tortilla in half to enclose the filling and press down gently to ensure it is evenly spread out.
Brush the tortilla with olive oil and sprinkle with garlic powder on top.
Heat a large hot pot vessel over medium heat and place the tortilla in the vessel.
Cook for 2-3 minutes on the first side or until the tortilla is lightly browned and the cheese is melted.
Flip the tortilla over and cook for another 2-3 minutes or until the other side is also lightly browned.
Repeat with the remaining ingredients to make 3 more quesadillas.
Serve the hot quesadillas in the hot pot vessel.
Let the quesadillas rest for 5 minutes before serving to allow the cheese to set and the tortilla to soften.
